creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
> Either disable PACKAGE_FETCH_BRANCH and build from scratch
 
> I decided for 1) and all ports were compiled successfully.

Doesn't that remove ability of using binary packages instead of building them?

I don't want to compile packages and that's why I want to use that feature but got the same issue in bug report.

> add failing ports into PACKAGE_FETCH_BLACKLIST

That's a bit hard to do because i blacklisted one and another one showed up again.

I couldn't revert poudriere to older version with other workaround.
